hero.headline: She remembers, so you don't have to.
hero.subheadline: Gate codes, grocery lists, brilliant ideas — just text Olive. She organizes everything and gives it back to you, clean and sorted, whenever you need it.
hero.trustSignal: Currently in Beta — shaping the future of personal organization

chooseMode.headline: One assistant. Every part of your life.
chooseMode.subheadline: Whether you're solo, syncing with a partner, or running a business — Olive adapts to you.

personal.headline: For You.
personal.painPoint: You text yourself reminders, links, and ideas. They vanish into the void. Olive catches them all and puts them exactly where they belong.

partner.headline: For You & Your Partner.
partner.painPoint: One of you remembers everything. The other forgets. Olive keeps you both on the same page — no nagging required.

business.headline: For Your Business.
business.painPoint: Log decisions, scan receipts, track expenses — all from your phone. No spreadsheets. No forgotten context.

superpowers.headline: Three steps. Zero effort.
superpowers.subheadline: Keep doing what you already do. Olive turns your messages into organized actions — automatically.

capture.title: 1. Drop It
capture.description: Text, voice note, photo, link — just send it to Olive on WhatsApp. No formatting. No folders. Just dump it.

organize.title: 2. Olive Organizes
organize.description: Groceries go to your grocery list. Dates land on your calendar. Ideas get saved. All automatic, all instant.

act.title: 3. Find It Instantly
act.description: Everything is clean, searchable, and shareable. Ask Olive anything — she'll find it in seconds. She can even nudge your partner for you.

security.title: Your Data, Locked Tight
security.description: Sensitive notes are encrypted at rest with AES-256. Only you can unlock them — not even Olive stores your data in plain text.

whatsappFirst.headline: Works where you already live.
whatsappFirst.description: No new apps to learn. Just forward a voice note, a photo, or a link to Olive on WhatsApp. She handles the rest.

items.quote: I used to text myself 10 things a day. Now I text Olive and everything just... appears organized. It feels like magic.
items.author: Sarah K.

items.quote: We stopped fighting about who forgot what. Olive is the neutral third party every couple needs.
items.author: Marcus & Jen

items.quote: I run my whole side business through Olive. Receipts, notes, client details — all organized without me lifting a finger.
items.author: David R.

pricing.headline: Simple pricing. Start free.
pricing.subheadline: No credit card. No commitment. Just start dropping things to Olive.
pricing.trustNote: Cancel anytime. No credit card required to start.

beta.headline: Free while in Beta
beta.description: We're building Olive with our earliest users. Everything is free during Beta — help us shape the future of personal organization.
beta.note: No credit card required. We'll announce pricing well before Beta ends.

footerCta.headline: Your ideas deserve better than a chat with yourself.
footerCta.subheadline: Join our Beta and help build the future of personal organization.
footerCta.trustNote: Free during Beta. No credit card required.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Olive App by GV Digital Labs. All rights reserved.
footer.madeWith: Olive Assistant — Made with ❤️ in Miami
footer.tagline: She remembers, so you don't have to.
